global.description: The ad features a vibrant orange background with a logo, headline, and call to action.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to book travel easily.

elements.label: Orange gradient background
elements.description: A smooth orange gradient background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: RouteBloom logo
elements.description: A stylized logo featuring the text 'RouteBloom' in a bold, modern font, positioned at the top center.

elements.label: Abstract shapes
elements.description: Two overlapping abstract shapes, one circular and one rectangular, drawn with a thin outline in the center.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: Bold, white text stating 'Book your next trip' positioned at the bottom center of the ad.
elements.text_content: Book your next trip Hotels flights in one tap

elements.label: Subheadline text
elements.description: Smaller white text below the headline that reads 'Hotels + flights in one tap'.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A prominent white button with the text 'Book now' centered at the bottom of the ad.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, bright and modern, RouteBloom logo, call to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by abstract shapes in the center, with the headline and subheadline at the bottom, and the CTA button at the very bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: RouteBloom, Book your next trip, Hotels + flights in one tap, Book now
